title: aphyllon fasciculatum var. luteum
intro: Aphyllon fasciculatum var. luteum, also known as California poppy or golden bush poppy, is a flowering plant native to California. The medicinal properties of this plant have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating anxiety and depression. The herbal preparations of Aphyllon fasciculatum var. luteum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made from the plant's leaves, flowers, and roots.
